title: Fed signals possible rate hike at March meeting
content: The Federal Reserve indicated this week that further rate increases remain on the table. Officials say data supports a yes resolution to the rate hike question.

title: Powell speech hints at hawkish stance
content: Fed Chair Powell delivered a hawkish speech that supports a yes outcome for those expecting a March hike.

title: Tesla Q4 deliveries miss expectations
content: Tesla reported Q4 deliveries below estimates. Analysts say this contradicts a yes outcome for the earnings beat market.

title: Tesla margin compression continues
content: Tesla's margin trajectory contradicts the bull case ahead of earnings.

title: Trump leads Iowa polls heading into caucuses
content: Polling shows Trump with a commanding lead in Iowa. The data supports a yes resolution to the primary question.

title: Trump campaign focuses Iowa ground game
content: Trump's Iowa operation strongly supports a primary win.

title: SpaceX Starship faces delays in test schedule
content: SpaceX's Starship is facing further delays. The current schedule contradicts an April 2024 launch.

title: Starship readiness pushed back
content: FAA review timing contradicts a launch before April.
